description: Add a theme that replicates the look of factory droid (research the factory droid ai system especially mission control)

log.outcome: The specification is based on a false premise. It assumes KB-024 (Theme system infrastructure with light/dark toggle and CSS variable architecture) is complete, but **no theme system exists in the codebase**. There is no `ColorTheme` type, no `ThemeSelector.tsx` component, no light/dark toggle, and no CSS variable architecture for themes. The current styles.css only contains a single hardcoded dark theme. This task cannot proceed as specified without first building the infrastructure it depends
